text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...I can feel a bit of a cool breeze. I guess fall is on
its way.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Time sure does fly, huh? This fall... I'll be running
the Tenno Sho with Tama.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...And then there's the Arima Kinen in the winter
afterward. That'll be the competition that
determines this year's top racer.
choice_data_list:
Let's show them what you've learned during
summer camp!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yeah. I've grown a lot during this year's camp.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
All that's left for me to do is to run as fast as I
can!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so concludes our productive summer camp.
